title: ZXSnake Guides
description: Official ZXSnake guides covering gameplay, controls, multiplayer, achievements, leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins, and everything you need to master the game.

pages.title: Overview
pages.description: Discover ZXSnake and learn what makes this modern take on the classic snake game part of the ZX Series.

pages.title: How to Play
pages.description: Learn the basics of ZXSnake, from collecting food to surviving longer and achieving higher scores.

pages.title: Controls
pages.description: Master smooth movement, quick turns, and the controls needed to survive longer.

pages.title: Game Modes
pages.description: Explore Solo, Local PVP, and World PVP to discover the way you want to play.

pages.title: BarkinMad Coins
pages.description: Earn BarkinMad Coins through gameplay and unlock cosmetic rewards across the ZX Series.

pages.title: Achievements
pages.description: Unlock achievements by playing regularly, reaching milestones, and improving your skills.

pages.title: Leaderboards
pages.description: Compete for the highest score and compare your performance with players around the world.

pages.title: Tips & Strategy
pages.description: Improve your planning, reactions, and movement with practical gameplay advice.

pages.title: Frequently Asked Questions
pages.description: Find answers to the most common questions about ZXSnake.

pages.title: Complete Guide
pages.description: Everything you need to know about ZXSnake in one complete guide.

pages.title: Screenshots
pages.description: Take a visual tour of ZXSnake and explore its gameplay, progression, and features.
